refnamediv.refpurpose: Composite a masked source image over a destination.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imseamlessclone(source, destination, mask) out = imseamlessclone(source, destination, mask, center, mode)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Composites the source where the mask is nonzero. The current macro implementation provides a predictable alpha-compositing fallback for equal-sized images; center and mode are accepted for API compatibility.

refsection.title: Examples
